title: release 1.7.2: bump, render, self-onboard, verify, tag, push
action: Standard release flow: node scripts/bump_version.mjs 1.7.2; then render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + release_manifest.mjs --write (bump does NOT re-render — v1.5.1/v1.7.0 gotcha); self-onboard (onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply); FULL configured verify FOREGROUND green; commit + tag v1.7.2; push with tags. No host propagation.
